CREATE TABLE temp_contacts (First_Name VARCHAR, Last_Name VARCHAR, Middle_Name VARCHAR, Name VARCHAR, Nickname VARCHAR, Email_Address VARCHAR, Home_Street VARCHAR, Home_City VARCHAR, Home_Postal_Code VARCHAR, Home_State VARCHAR, Home_Country_Region VARCHAR, Home_Phone VARCHAR, Home_Fax VARCHAR, Mobile_Phone VARCHAR, Personal_Web_Page VARCHAR, Business_Street VARCHAR, Business_City VARCHAR, Business_Postal_Code VARCHAR, Business_State VARCHAR, Business_Country_Region VARCHAR, Business_Web_Page VARCHAR, Business_Phone VARCHAR, Business_Fax VARCHAR, Pager VARCHAR, Company VARCHAR, Job_Title VARCHAR, Department VARCHAR, Office_Location VARCHAR, Notes VARCHAR);

CREATE PROCEDURE my_csv_lf (in file_name varchar) { declare tb_name varchar; declare ar any; ar := csv_table_def(file_name); ar := split_and_decode(ar, 0, '\0\0 '); tb_name := trim (ar[2], '"'); exec(csv_table_def(file_name)); csv_load_file(file_name, 0, null, concat('DB.DBA.', tb_name)); };
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM temp_contacts WHERE Business_State = 'NY' AND Home_Country_Region = 'USA';
SELECT DISTINCT First_Name, Last_Name FROM temp_contacts WHERE Nickname IS NOT NULL;
SELECT t1.First_Name, t2.Business_City FROM temp_contacts t1 JOIN temp_contacts t2 ON t1.Company = t2.Company WHERE t1.Last_Name != t2.Last_Name;
SELECT * FROM temp_contacts WHERE Home_Phone LIKE '%.%' OR Business_Phone LIKE '%.%';
SELECT AVG(LENGTH(First_Name)) AS Avg_First_Name_Length FROM temp_contacts;
CREATE TABLE csv_import_error_log (Error_ID INT, File_Name VARCHAR, Error_Message VARCHAR, Timestamp TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO csv_import_error_log (Error_ID, File_Name, Error_Message, Timestamp) VALUES (1, 'tmp/MyContacts.csv', 'Invalid format', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT * FROM csv_import_error_log ORDER BY Timestamp DESC;
